where.if: AND ( TITLE LIKE '%' || #{dto.keyword} || '%' OR WRITER LIKE '%' || #{dto.keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_ID as "boardId", CATEGORY as "category", TITLE as "title", WRITER as "writer", VIEW_COUNT as "viewCount", LIKE_COUNT as "likeCount", CREATED_AT as "createdAt" FROM BOARD
ORDER BY BOARD_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{dto.size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT BOARD_ID as "boardId", CATEGORY as "category", TITLE as "title", CONTENT as "content", WRITER as "writer", VIEW_COUNT as "viewCount", LIKE_COUNT as "likeCount", CREATED_AT as "createdAt" FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN CATEGORY = 'NOTICE' THEN 1 END) AS "NOTICE_CNT", COUNT(CASE WHEN CATEGORY = 'SUGGESTION' THEN 1 END) AS "SUGGESTION_CNT" FROM BOARD

SELECT COMMENT_ID as "commentId", BOARD_ID as "boardId", PARENT_ID as "parentId", CONTENT as "content", WRITER as "writer", CREATED_AT as "createdAt", (LEVEL - 1) as "depth" -- 1부터 시작하는 LEVEL을 0부터 시작하도록 보정 FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} START WITH PARENT_ID IS NULL -- 최상위 댓글부터 시작 CONNECT BY PRIOR COMMENT_ID = PARENT_ID -- 부모 ID와 자식의 PARENT_ID 연결 ORDER SIBLINGS BY CREATED_AT ASC -- 형제들(같은 레벨)끼리 작성순 정렬

SELECT COMMENT_ID as "commentId", BOARD_ID as "boardId", PARENT_ID as "parentId", CONTENT as "content", WRITER as "writer", CREATED_AT as "createdAt" FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
